description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a large, curved body and a glossy, dark finish with subtle marbling. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, and the piano lid is fully closed, covering the strings and soundboard. The legs are sturdy and squared, with gold-colored footings, and three pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The inner rim of the piano displays a decorative wood grain pattern, adding a touch of sophistication. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood and metal, typical of high-quality grand pianos. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A grand piano with a glossy, marbled black finish, closed lid, and decorative wood grain inner rim. It features a full keyboard, three pedals, and gold-accented feet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full keyboard, decorative inner rim, and two sturdy legs with gold footings.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the closed, marbled lid and the curved body of the piano.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the closed lid, the length of the piano, and the keyboard edge.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the entire keyboard, three pedals, and the piano's symmetrical front legs.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement, no missing or split keys.
